input: What is your return policy for electronics?
output: Our return policy for electronics states that they can be returned within 30 days if unopened. If the item has been opened, it is only eligible for an exchange.

tool_calls.name: check_policy
tool_calls.result: {"category": "electronics", "policy": "Electronics can be returned within 30 days if unopened. Opened items are eligible for exchange only."}
